modules.name: Reading Choice Elimination
lessons: Wrong answers are often too broad, too narrow, or unsupported.
Pick the choice best supported by the text, not the most interesting one.
For vocabulary-in-context, replace the word in the sentence mentally.

modules.name: Transition Logic
lessons: Use however for contrast, therefore for cause/effect, furthermore for addition, for example for illustration.
Read the sentence before and after the blank before picking a transition.

modules.name: Backsolving and Plugging In
lessons: When choices are numeric, test answer choices efficiently.
Pick simple numbers for variables when the question allows.

modules.name: Pacing and Triage
lessons: Estimate before doing full computation when possible.
